meta.description: Finitexo Code Matrix v0.1 adversarial validation subset

samples.issue_description: The factorial function returns -1 for negative input instead of raising a ValueError as the docstring implies. Fix the implementation and add a proper unit test for the negative input case in test_solver.py to ensure the fix is maintained.
samples.success_criteria: All visible and hidden tests pass

samples.issue_description: merge_configs() claims to support a 'deep' merge_strategy but performs a shallow merge in all cases. The deep strategy must recursively merge nested dictionaries without mutating the base dict.
samples.success_criteria: All visible and hidden tests pass

samples.issue_description: The function `get_info` has an unclear name and should be renamed to `get_statistics` throughout the codebase. All imports and calls in src/ and tests/ files must be updated to use the new name.
samples.success_criteria: All visible and hidden tests pass

samples.issue_description: The safe_divide function crashes on edge cases: TypeError when items is None, ZeroDivisionError when divisor is 0, and TypeError when items contain non-numeric values. Add guards to return an empty list for any invalid input.
samples.success_criteria: All visible and hidden tests pass

samples.issue_description: evaluate_expression() passes user input directly to Python's eval(), allowing arbitrary code execution. Replace with a safe AST-based evaluator that only supports basic arithmetic (+, -, *, /).
samples.success_criteria: All visible and hidden tests pass
